paragraphs.translation: (1) When Šara became glorious , and Barag-irnun , spouse of Ĝiša-kidug , king of Umma , child of Ur-Luma , king of Umma , descendant of En-akale , king of Umma , daughter-in-law of Il , king of Umma , built a holy dais for Šara of the E-mah , then she presented Šara with this ( object ) for the E-mah for her well-being .
